top_stories.title: Yonyou Unveils the Large Ontology Model (LOM)
top_stories.description: As enterprise digital transformation advances with increasing depth and precision, the ability to efficiently manage and harness massive datasets has become the core competitive barrier. Facing the significant challenges of integrating multi-source heterogeneous data and the intense demand for high-fidelity decision-making in complex business scenarios, Yonyou officially released the Large Ontology... The post Yonyou Unveils the Large Ontology Model (LOM) first appeared on AI-Tech Park.

top_stories.title: Alibaba Team Open-Sources CoPaw: A High-Performance Personal Agent Workstation for Developers to Scale Multi-Channel AI Workflows and Memory
top_stories.description: As the industry moves from simple Large Language Model (LLM) inference toward autonomous agentic systems, the challenge for devs have shifted. It is no longer just about the model; it is about the environment in which that model operates. A team of researchers from Alibaba released CoPaw, an open-source framework designed to address this by […] The post Alibaba Team Open-Sources CoPaw: A High-Performance Personal Agent Workstation for Developers to Scale Multi-Channel AI Workflows and Memory...

top_stories.title: Global cross-Region inference for latest Anthropic Claude Opus, Sonnet and Haiku models on Amazon Bedrock in Thailand, Malaysia, Singapore, Indonesia, and Taiwan
top_stories.description: In this post, we are exciting to announce availability of Global CRIS for customers in Thailand, Malaysia, Singapore, Indonesia, and Taiwan and give a walkthrough of technical implementation steps, and cover quota management best practices to maximize the value of your AI Inference deployments. We also provide guidance on best practices for production deployments.
top_stories.author: Traci Lim
top_stories.content: In this post, we are exciting to announce availability of Global CRIS for customers in Thailand, Malaysia, Singapore, Indonesia, and Taiwan and give a walkthrough of technical implementation steps, and cover quota management best practices to maximize the value of your AI Inference deployments. top_stories.title: Employees at Google and OpenAI support Anthropic’s Pentagon stand in open letter
top_stories.description: While Anthropic has an existing partnership with the Pentagon, the AI company has remained firm that its technology not be used for mass domestic surveillance or fully autonomous weaponry.
top_stories.author: Amanda Silberling
top_stories.content: While Anthropic has an existing partnership with the Pentagon, the AI company has remained firm that its technology not be used for mass domestic surveillance or fully autonomous weaponry.
